languages.text: "Я лично сразил инквизитора Диодаса и палатину — тем самым легендарным клинком. Лишившись лидера, аколиты безумца признали мое превосходство и оставили попытки прорваться во дворец". {n}Несмотря на помехи вокс-синтезатора, вы безошибочно узнаете гордость в голосе предка.{/n}

"I personally slew Inquisitor Diodas and the Palatine with that very blade of legend. With their leader gone, the madman's acolytes acknowledged my superiority and abandoned their efforts to breach the palace." {n}Despite the vox-synthesiser's interference, you recognise unmistakably the pride in your ancestor's voice.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Я лично сразил инквизитора Диодаса и палатину — тем самым легендарным клинком. Лишившись лидера, аколиты безумца признали мое превосходство и оставили попытки прорваться во дворец". {n}Несмотря на помехи вокс-синтезатора, вы безошибочно узнаете гордость в голосе предка.{/n}

With their leader gone, the madman's acolytes acknowledged my superiority and abandoned their efforts to breach the palace." {n}Despite the vox-synthesiser's interference, you recognise unmistakably the pride in your ancestor's voice.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich erschlug Inquisitor Diodas und die Palatine mit dieser legendären Klinge. Ihres Anführers beraubt, bestätigten die Akolythen des Wahnsinnigen meine Überlegenheit und versuchten nicht länger, in den Palast einzudringen." {n}Trotz der Interferenz des Vox-Synthesizers erkennst du eindeutig den Stolz in der Stimme deines Ahnherren.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I personally slew Inquisitor Diodas and the Palatine with that very blade of legend. With their leader gone, the madman's acolytes acknowledged my superiority and abandoned their efforts to breach the palace." {n}Despite the vox-synthesiser's interference, you recognise unmistakably the pride in your ancestor's voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich erschlug Inquisitor Diodas und die Palatine mit dieser legendären Klinge. Ihres Anführers beraubt, bestätigten die Akolythen des Wahnsinnigen meine Überlegenheit und versuchten nicht länger, in den Palast einzudringen." {n}Trotz der Interferenz des Vox-Synthesizers erkennst du eindeutig den Stolz in der Stimme deines Ahnherren.{/n}

languages.text: « J'ai personnellement abattu l'inquisiteur Diodas et la Palatine avec cette même épée légendaire. Sans personne pour les diriger, les acolytes du dément ont reconnu ma supériorité et cessé leurs assauts contre le palais. » {n}Malgré les parasites brouillant le synthétiseur-vox, la fierté de votre ancêtre est manifeste.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I personally slew Inquisitor Diodas and the Palatine with that very blade of legend. With their leader gone, the madman's acolytes acknowledged my superiority and abandoned their efforts to breach the palace." {n}Despite the vox-synthesiser's interference, you recognise unmistakably the pride in your ancestor's voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « J'ai personnellement abattu l'inquisiteur Diodas et la Palatine avec cette même épée légendaire. Sans personne pour les diriger, les acolytes du dément ont reconnu ma supériorité et cessé leurs assauts contre le palais. » {n}Malgré les parasites brouillant le synthétiseur-vox, la fierté de votre ancêtre est manifeste.{/n}

languages.text: «Segué personalmente la vida del Inquisidor Diodas y de Palatine con esa legendaria espada. Sin su líder, los acólitos de este lunático reconocieron mi superioridad y abandonaron sus esfuerzos de invadir el palacio». {n}Pese a las interferencias del voco sintetizador, reconoces fácilmente el orgullo de la voz de tu antepasado.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I personally slew Inquisitor Diodas and the Palatine with that very blade of legend. With their leader gone, the madman's acolytes acknowledged my superiority and abandoned their efforts to breach the palace." {n}Despite the vox-synthesiser's interference, you recognise unmistakably the pride in your ancestor's voice.{/n}

languages.text: "Engizitör Diodas'ı ve Palatin'i bizzat o efsanevi kılıçla öldürdüm. Liderleri gidince deli herifin havarileri, üstünlüğümü kabul edip saraya girme çabalarından vazgeçti." {n}Voks sentezleyicisindeki parazite rağmen atanın sesindeki gururu açıkça fark ediyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I personally slew Inquisitor Diodas and the Palatine with that very blade of legend. With their leader gone, the madman's acolytes acknowledged my superiority and abandoned their efforts to breach the palace." {n}Despite the vox-synthesiser's interference, you recognise unmistakably the pride in your ancestor's voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Engizitör Diodas'ı ve Palatin'i bizzat o efsanevi kılıçla öldürdüm. Liderleri gidince deli herifin havarileri, üstünlüğümü kabul edip saraya girme çabalarından vazgeçti." {n}Voks sentezleyicisindeki parazite rağmen atanın sesindeki gururu açıkça fark ediyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: “我正是用那把传奇之刃，亲手斩杀了审判官狄奥达斯和帕拉蒂尼。首脑一死，那疯子的侍仆便承认我技高一筹，放弃了攻破宫殿的图谋。”{n}尽管音阵合成器带着杂音，你依然能清楚地听出先祖声音里的那份骄傲。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I personally slew Inquisitor Diodas and the Palatine with that very blade of legend. With their leader gone, the madman's acolytes acknowledged my superiority and abandoned their efforts to breach the palace." {n}Despite the vox-synthesiser's interference, you recognise unmistakably the pride in your ancestor's voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我正是用那把传奇之刃，亲手斩杀了审判官狄奥达斯和帕拉蒂尼。首脑一死，那疯子的侍仆便承认我技高一筹，放弃了攻破宫殿的图谋。”{n}尽管音阵合成器带着杂音，你依然能清楚地听出先祖声音里的那份骄傲。{/n}

languages.text: 「私はこの伝説の剣で、インキジター・ディオダスと宮廷の者を討ちました。彼らの指導者がいなくなったことで、狂人の信者たちは私の優位性を認め、宮殿を突破する努力を放棄しました。」{n}ボイス・シンセサイザーの妨害にもかかわらず、あなたは祖先の声に感じられる誇りを間違いなく認識します。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I personally slew Inquisitor Diodas and the Palatine with that very blade of legend. With their leader gone, the madman's acolytes acknowledged my superiority and abandoned their efforts to breach the palace." {n}Despite the vox-synthesiser's interference, you recognise unmistakably the pride in your ancestor's voice.{/n}
